topStories.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi urges open shipping lanes, condemns attacks on energy infrastructure in talks with Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian

topStories.title: Congress to fight 100 seats in Assam assembly elections after forging alliance with five other parties
topStories.description: Congress on Friday released its fourth list of seven candidates, taking its total to 94 nominees for the 126-seat Assam Assembly elections.

topStories.title: 'BRICS must play independent role': Iran on what President Pezeshkian told PM Modi
topStories.description: Iran President Pezeshkian said the discussions with PM Narendra Modi covered bilateral ties as well as “regional and international developments”.

topStories.title: Iranian woman’s video of US-Israel attack ends as bomb hits
topStories.description: The fate of an Iranian woman caught in a US-Israeli bomb attack is unknown, after video emerged of her filming it.

topStories.title: Elon Musk offers to pay salaries of unpaid TSA staff due to partial government shutdown
topStories.description: Amid the partial US government shutdown, Elon Musk proposed covering TSA personnel salaries. Essential TSA workers are struggling without pay, leading to staff shortages and long wait times at airports. Reports indicate some employees are seeking extra jobs or assistance.

topStories.title: Unease in Japan after Trump cites Pearl Harbor to defend Iran war
topStories.description: US president's reference to Japan's 1941 attack has shaken Japanese as PM Takaichi's silence gets mixed reaction.

topStories.title: US Says Iran Threat To Strait of Hormuz "Degraded" After Strikes
topStories.description: US Says Iran Threat To Strait of Hormuz "Degraded" After Strikes

topStories.title: US & its allies' ‘attempts to silence voice’: Iranian-linked hacking group as its website back after FBI seized domains
topStories.description: Following a cyberattack on Stryker, the Iranian-linked Handala Hack Team's website went back online after the FBI seized its domains. The group claimed the seizures were attempts to suppress their voice, while Stryker is working to restore its systems and confirmed product safety.

topStories.title: Amid Hormuz Crisis, PM Speaks To Iran President, Stresses Open Shipping Lanes
topStories.description: "Reiterated the importance of safeguarding freedom of navigation," Prime Minister Narendra Modi said after his conversation with Masoud Pezeshkian.

topStories.title: Duggar couple arrested: What are the new charges against Joseph Duggar and Kendra Duggar?
topStories.description: Former reality star Joseph Duggar will be transferred to Florida to face child molestation charges after waiving his extradition hearing. He faces serious allegations, including false imprisonment, mirroring past legal troubles of his brother, Josh Duggar, who was convicted of child sexual abuse.

topStories.title: Iranian man, Romanian woman arrested trying to enter UK's Falsane nuclear base amid Israel-US' conflict with Iran
topStories.description: The man and the woman are due to appear at Dumbarton Sheriff Court on Monday. It also mentioned that enquiries are currently underway

dailyNews.title: US-Israel, Iran conflict: Pezeshkian calls for forming ‘Islamic Assembly of the Middle East,' seeks help from neighbors
dailyNews.description: Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian on Saturday called for the establishment of an Islamic Assembly of the Middle East, to ensure regional stability and peace. In a statement, he sought to mend ties with Arab neighbours amid the ongoing conflict

dailyNews.title: Quote of the day by Leo Tolstoy: ‘The two most powerful warriors are patience and...'
dailyNews.description: Leo Tolstoy's inspiring words serves a reminder that the two most powerful warriors are patience and time. While patience keeps us grounded in reality, time helps us in moving forward. The quote is extremely relevant in today's time, when everyone wants results instantly.

dailyNews.title: Iran says US and Israel attacked Natanz nuclear facility
dailyNews.description: No leakage of radioactive materials reported in the area in central Iran, Tehran's atomic energy organisation says.

dailyNews.title: West Asia: US, Israeli strikes target Iran's Natanz nuclear facility, IAEA says no increase in off-site radiation levels
dailyNews.description: The US and Israel launched an attack on Saturday (local time), targeting Iran's Natanz uranium-enrichment facility. However, no radioactive leaks occurred, Reuters reported, citing Tasnim news agency.

dailyNews.title: US jury finds Elon Musk misled investors during Twitter purchase
dailyNews.description: Jury finds that two tweets posted in May 2022 by Musk contained false statements.

dailyNews.title: PM Modi conveys Eid and Nowruz greetings to Iran President, stresses on open shipping lanes amid West Asia conflict
dailyNews.description: PM Modi spoke with Iranian President Dr. Masoud Pezeshkian, extending Eid and Nowruz greetings while emphasizing hope for peace and stability in West Asia. He condemned attacks on infrastructure, warning they disrupt global supply chains and stressed the need to secure shipping routes.

dailyNews.title: War spirals as information control tightens
dailyNews.description: From Washington to Tehran to Tel Aviv, the fight to control the narrative seems as critical as the war itself.

dailyNews.title: 'Shipping lanes must remain open, secure': PM Modi speaks with Iran President, second since West Asia war
dailyNews.description: PM Modi said, “Spoke with President Dr. Masoud Pezeshkian and conveyed Eid and Nowruz greetings.”

dailyNews.title: Russian drone attack kills two in Ukraine ahead of talks in US, officials say
dailyNews.description: Two children, aged 11 and 15 were also injured in the attack which took place in Zaporizhzhia.

dailyNews.title: Child safety nonprofit founded by Steyer’s brother has multiple Epstein ties: 'No concerns'
dailyNews.description: Jim Steyer's nonprofit Common Sense Media reportedly has five board members with ties to Jeffrey Epstein, raising questions about alignment with the organization's goals of protecting children.

dailyNews.title: Tallest college basketball player ever towers over 6-foot-8 opponent in viral March Madness moment
dailyNews.description: Florida's Olivier Rioux went viral during the team's win over Prairie View A&M when he checked into the game, as Hassane Diallo was taken aback by his height.

dailyNews.title: Hollywood outlet slammed for saying Chuck Norris' politics, 'cop agenda' overshadowed his legacy
dailyNews.description: Variety is facing backlash after publishing a piece arguing Chuck Norris' film legacy is overshadowed by politics, drawing condemnation from top Republicans.

topStories.title: NBA champion Thunder to skip White House visit, citing 'timing' issue
topStories.description: The 2025 NBA champion Oklahoma City Thunder won't visit the White House, citing timing issues after talks with the administration did not work out.

topStories.title: High Gas Prices, Driven Up by the Iran War, Loom Over the Midterms
topStories.description: The war has complicated the Republican message on affordability. Democrats see an opportunity to drive their economic message while tying President Trump to an unpopular overseas conflict.

topStories.title: Trump’s Ballroom Architect Is Skilled at Shrugging Off Outrage
topStories.description: Shalom Baranes, who arrived in the U.S. as a Libyan refugee and went on to renovate the Pentagon, is baffling fellow architects for accepting the job. But he said some of his previous projects have drawn outrage too.

topStories.title: One Year After Trump’s $400 Million Ultimatum, a Different Columbia
topStories.description: As they sought to respond to charges of antisemitism and harassment on campus, administrators and trustees made promises. Many have been kept, but not all.

topStories.title: Fidel Castro’s Grandson Flaunts Beer, Nikes and Trump Jokes on Instagram
topStories.description: Sandro Castro has drawn scrutiny for his Instagram posts in which he flaunts a life of luxury while using satire to point out the very deterioration his family’s leadership helped create.

dailyNews.title: Trump Is Hiding the Truth About the War in Iran
dailyNews.description: Whatever short-term gain the president thinks he is getting by lying about the war in Iran is far exceeded by the cost, for him, the country and the world.

dailyNews.title: Trump signals possible "winding down" in Iran as Marines head to Middle East
dailyNews.description: President Trump said Friday on social media that the U.S. is considering "winding down" its military efforts against Iran. Meanwhile, more than 2,000 Marines and more warships are headed to the region.

dailyNews.title: Analysis: Trump's unshackled presidency puts him at the center of the economy
dailyNews.description: The president's unprecedented use of executive power has made him a driving force behind oil prices, the Federal Reserve's interest rates and more.

dailyNews.title: Opinion: As Trump eyes Cuba, my trips there a decade ago remind me how different things were
dailyNews.description: Trump has threatened a 'friendly takeover' of Cuba after cutting it off from Venezuela's oil. CNBC's Justin Solomon reflects how different things used to be.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.

dailyNews.title: Beijing Signals Readiness to Talk to Trump's Team, Even Old Foes
dailyNews.description: The Chinese foreign minister spoke by phone with Marco Rubio, the new secretary of state who has been a critic of Beijing.

dailyNews.title: Canada Is Becoming a Fentanyl Exporter, and a Target for Trump
dailyNews.description: The drug is increasingly manufactured in and trafficked from the U.S.’s northern neighbor, though the numbers remain small compared with Mexico.

dailyNews.title: Trump weighs deploying ground troops
dailyNews.description: President Trump is weighing whether to send possibly thousands of U.S. troops into Iran as he looks for a way to achieve some of his key goals and end the war, according to the two current U.S. officials, two former U.S. officials and another person familiar with the discussions. NBC News’ Courtney Kube reports.

dailyNews.title: Intelligence chiefs' testimony is out of sync with Trump's talking points
dailyNews.description: For the first time since the U.S. launched a war on Iran, this week top intelligence officials spoke publicly about the conflict.

dailyNews.title: Iran live updates: Trump says he is considering 'winding down' Iran military efforts
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump announced "major combat operations" against Iran on Feb. 28, with massive joint U.S.-Israel strikes.

dailyNews.title: Underground Railroad museum says Trump administration cut funds over race
dailyNews.description: The founders of an Underground Railroad history site in Albany, N.Y., claim the Trump administration’s funding cuts were aimed at marginalizing Black history.
